properties.titulo_evento: Iran: Dignitaries arrive for Ayatollah Khamenei's funeral
properties.descricao: Officials from China, Russia, India and other countries are in Tehran as Iran prepares to mourn the Supreme Leader, who was killed in an airstrike at the start of the US-Israeli campaign against Iran.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany news: Workers protest Mercedes-Benz cost-cutting
properties.descricao: Thousands of Mercedes-Benz workers across Germany are protesting the carmaker's cost-cutting drive. Meanwhile, firefighters rescued two window cleaners from a faulty platform high above Frankfurt. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine: Russia strikes kill 4 as Kyiv holds day of mourning
properties.descricao: The overnight strikes by Russia came a day after massive missile and drone attacks on Ukraine's capital, Kyiv, where a day of mourning is being observed.

properties.titulo_evento: Man dies after setting himself on fire outside UN headquarters in New York
properties.descricao: A man has died after setting himself alight outside the UN headquarters in New York. Activists identified him as a Tibetan activist, though authorities have not confirmed his identity or motive.

properties.titulo_evento: AI drones made in Germany see duty on Ukraine's front line
properties.descricao: The German defense company Helsing is supplying combat drones to Ukraine and will soon provide them to the German army. How effective are they on the front line? DW joined a Ukrainian combat mission to find out.

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela leader rejects criticism for earthquake response
properties.descricao: Acting President Delcy Rodríguez has slammed critics for saying her government was slow to respond to the disaster. She said the criticism was "manufactured in propaganda laboratories."

properties.descricao: Ballistic and cruise missiles and drones were used in what Kyiv's mayor, Vitali Klitschko, said was the largest attack on the city since the war began.

properties.titulo_evento: After heat wave: Wildfires ravage southern France
properties.descricao: Firefighters battle several wildfires in southern France that were fueled by strong winds. Nearly 3,000 tourists and locals were evacuated.

properties.titulo_evento: German coalition agrees on changes to pensions, tax rates
properties.descricao: After its first year in office, Germany's coalition government plans to push through sweeping changes with the stated goal of reviving a sluggish economy. The plans met with a mixed reaction.

properties.titulo_evento: Fact check: Racist German fan petition story false
properties.descricao: It has been claimed that following Germany's World Cup exit, some fans launched a petition seeking to ban "African" and "Muslim" players from the national team — and that DW reported the story. This is not true.

properties.titulo_evento: Failing to deter Putin would cost more than paying for defense, Estonian PM warns EU

properties.titulo_evento: EU conservatives attempt family therapy in Washington
properties.descricao: A group of center-right EU politicians visited Washington to repair ties with a White House that had promised to cultivate European conservatives.

properties.descricao: Christine Lagarde's premature resignation would allow political leaders to choose her successor ahead of France's next presidential election.

properties.descricao: Rome has voiced concerns linked to sanctioning a Christian leader.

properties.descricao: A rebound in hiring has put more pressure on the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates. New jobs numbers are scheduled for release on Thursday.
